name: Ritual Engine
description: Design repeatable fan rituals, naming systems, participation loops, and recurring community formats, then output a ritual calendar.
short_description: Design sustainable rituals, loops, and cadence plans.
audience: Community designers building repeatable participation formats
Creator strategists matching rituals to publishing cadence
Brand operators checking moderation capacity and fatigue safeguards
detail_lines: Turns publishing cadence, community habits, launch moments, moderation capacity, and tone limits into named recurring rituals.
Exports participation loops, weekly or event-driven cadence, guardrails, fatigue safeguards, and pilot plans with stop conditions.
Works only from public or user-authorized material and rejects compulsive streaks, guilt-driven participation, and emotionally coercive loops.
